skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Impact-Type Exospine: Critical Rate ▲ 60% continuously.
Activates after landing 44 critical hit(s) with normal attacks. Affects random enemy units. Unstable Energy: Deals 240% of final ATK as damage. Attacks sequentially 3 time(s).
skill1.where: skill1[1]: hitCount 59 → enemy, flatDamage 720% (240×3 consolidated), flavor sequential
skill1.note: Trigger approximated: 44 crit hits ÷ 0.75 crit rate ≈ 59 total hits. Damage consolidated 240%×3 = 720%. Sequential flavor exempts from FB per noFb relic status (FB now applies by timing per DECISIONS). Cadence is kit-math, not measured.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when Unstable Energy hits an Electric Code target. Affects the target. Damage Taken ▲ 10% for 10 sec.
skill1.note: Modeled as permanent while boss is Electric, not 10s-duration per proc. Over-credits only the opening ~4.9s before first proc. Approximation documented in caveats.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Eagle Eye-Type Exospine. Previous effects trigger repeatedly.
skill2.where: Inherent in sim design — skill1 blocks keep firing throughout the fight
skill2.note: 'Previous effects trigger repeatedly' is a restatement that S1 keeps working; no separate block needed. The Eagle Eye label itself is cosmetic.

skill2.kitLine: ATK ▲ 50% of the skill user's ATK continuously.

skill2.where: skill2[0]: passive → self, maxAmmoPct +25 (same block as ATK buff)

skill2.kitLine: Activates when landing 10 normal attack(s) on an Electric Code target. Affects self. Reloads 3 round(s).
skill2.note: Two deviations: (1) Electric-target gate dropped — fires unconditionally; (2) 5% of buffed 75-round mag = 4 rounds vs kit's flat 3. Both documented in caveats.

burst.kitLine: Affects random enemy units. Deals 457.14% of final ATK as damage. Attacks sequentially for 6 time(s).
burst.note: Consolidated 457.14%×6 = 2742.84%. Deliberately NO sequential flavor on the nuke — kit tags it sequential, but flavoring it would let Mk2 double the nuke, which the kit does NOT say. Documented in caveats.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Exospine Mk2. Function: Enhances Exospine. Duration: 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: burstCast → self, durationSec 10 on both buffs
burst.note: Container for the two Mk2 sub-effects below.

burst.kitLine: Triggers Impact-Type Exospine Mk2. Effect: Damage multiplier of Unstable Energy sequential attacks is scaled by 100%.
burst.note: Gates on the sequential flavor of Unstable Energy. True ×2 solo, but dilutes below ×2 when other Damage-Up-bucket buffs are live. Accepted ⚑.

burst.kitLine: Triggers Eagle Eye-Type Exospine Mk2. Effect: Damage multiplier of Eagle Eye-Type Exospine is scaled by 100%.
burst.note: Eagle Eye's damage multiplier IS the casterAtkPct 50 buff. Scaling by 100% = doubling it = +50 more for 10s (total 100 during Mk2). Correct.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Unstable Energy cadence (hitCount 59) assumes 75% crit at scope lock (44 crit hits / 0.75 = 58.67); external crit-rate buffs on eve would shorten the real cadence — the static threshold cannot respond.
documentedConfounds.why: Scope lock has no external crit-rate buffs (solo raid, fixed team). The 75% assumption (60 kit + 15 base) is exact at scope. Only breaks if eve receives external crit buffs, which is out of scope.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Damage Taken ▲10% is modeled as permanent while the boss is Electric (kit: 10s per Unstable Energy hit on an Electric target; ~full uptime after the first proc at ~4.9s, so the approximation over-credits only the opening seconds).
documentedConfounds.why: Over-credits ~4.9s of opening time only. In a 180s fight this is <3% of fight duration applied to a 10% taken buff — negligible DPS impact.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the 3-round reload refund is modeled unconditionally (kit gates it on hitting an ELECTRIC target — it should be inert vs non-Electric bosses) and as 5% of BUFFED max ammo (engine rounds 75×0.05 to 4 rounds vs the kit's flat 3).
documentedConfounds.why: Two deviations compound: (1) fires vs non-Electric bosses where it should be inert — free reloads; (2) grants 4 rounds not 3 even vs Electric. Both inflate DPS. The 4-vs-3 is ~33% over-credit per proc; the unconditional gate is a full false-positive vs non-Electric.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Mk2's Unstable Energy doubling uses sequentialDamagePct +100 in the shared Damage-Up bucket — a TRUE ×2 solo, but dilutes below ×2 whenever other Damage-Up-bucket buffs are live (accepted ⚑). The burst nuke itself carries no sequential flavor: kit tags it sequential, but flavoring it would also let Mk2 double the nuke, which the kit does NOT say.
documentedConfounds.why: Direction depends on team comp: dilution under-counts Mk2's Unstable Energy boost when other Damage-Up buffs are present (under-credit), but the nuke deliberately excludes sequential to avoid a false Mk2 doubling (correct). Net direction is team-dependent. Accepted ⚑ — cannot be resolved without a separate sequential-damage multiplier bucket.

documentedConfounds.text: noFb RELIC status: Unstable Energy's sequential proc had noFb removed in a prior session — FB now applies by timing (DECISIONS-mandated). She grades ~1.14 (over).
documentedConfounds.why: The note states she grades ~1.14 (over-predicts by 14%). The residual is attributed to the Mk2 sequentialDamagePct dilution ⚑ interacting with now-applied FB. No focused eve video exists to settle empirically. Documented OPEN.

documentedConfounds.text: NO focused eve video exists in the catalog, so the Mk2 dilution residual cannot be settled empirically — documented OPEN, do NOT fudge to close it.
documentedConfounds.why: Measurement gap, not a modeling error. The author explicitly flags this as unresolvable with current evidence.

authorIntentSummary: The override models all 8 kit lines: S1 crit-rate passive, Unstable Energy nuke (44-crit-hit cadence proxied as hitCount 59 at 75% crit, 240%×3 consolidated to 720% sequential), Electric-gated Damage Taken; S2 casterAtk +50 and maxAmmo +25 passives plus a 10-hit reload refund; burst 457.14%×6 nuke (deliberately unflavored to prevent Mk2 doubling it) and Mk2's 10s sequentialDamagePct +100 / casterAtkPct +50. Key approximations: hitCount 59 is kit-math not measured, Damage Taken is permanent-vs-Electric not 10s-per-proc, reload refund is unconditional and grants 4 rounds not 3, and Mk2's Unstable Energy doubling uses the shared Damage-Up bucket (dilutes under other Damage-Up buffs — accepted ⚑). The unit grades ~1.14 over with no board data and no focused video to resolve the residual; the author explicitly marks this OPEN and forbids fudging.
